nodes.name: 小天鹅
nodes.summary: 小天鹅（Tundra swan，学名 Cygnus columbianus），分类上属于雁形目，并归入鸭科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联14个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、污染。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The winter habitat of both subspecies is grassland and marshland, often near the coast; they like to visit fields after harvest to feed on discarded grains and while on migration may stop over on mountain lakes. According to National Geographic, when migrating these birds can fly at altitudes of in a V formation

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Iranian wintering population is small—1,000 birds or so at most—but they usually disperse to several sites, some of which are still unknown to scientists. Although tundra swan numbers are stable over most of its range, they are increasingly dependent on agricultural crops to supplement their winter diet, as aquatic vegetation in their winter habitat dwindles due to habitat destruction and water pollution
